commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a97fd4f7f1e1fb01603842f9a116cf0055e67f59)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Slack per-channel `ignoreOtherMentions` config field, a Slack inbound drop predicate, and unit tests for user-mention cases.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +102. Total +125 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows the strict Slack channel schema lacks the new key, and the new guard checks only user mentions even though Slack subteam mentions are parsed separately. No real Slack workspace reproduction proof is present in the PR.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor real-behavior proof plus maintainer/product review for the new Slack config surface before any repair or merge path should take over.

target.title: feat(slack): add ignoreOtherMentions config option for channels
target.author: priyansh19
